pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Eval-time n-gram hash caching mixed with transformer logits (and global sync) reveals how huge hash tables inflate effective model size during evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: This is a non-record evaluation study, not a val-only training regime.
techniques: - causal n-gram hash cache mixed with neural logits
- hash collisions acting as lossy sketches for high orders
